Patch Set 11:

OK, this is ready for review.  I think this is the cleanest way.  Another option is to always allocate LNET_MAX_STR_LEN chars for ni_interface, but that isn't any easier to read in my opinion, and imposes an artificial limitation (although it's much much longer than real interface names that I've seen).

Thanks
